coach.hint: Chunk it: Then I go to the bathroom.

items.line_en: I brush my teeth and change into my pajamas.

coach.say: I brush my teeth and change into my pajamas.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I brush my teeth and / change into my pajamas.

items.line_en: I lie down in my bed.

coach.say: I lie down in my bed.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I lie down in my bed.

items.line_en: My body feels tired, but my heart feels good.

coach.say: My body feels tired, but my heart feels good.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My body feels tired, / but my heart feels good.

items.line_en: Every day is full of work.

coach.say: Every day is full of work.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Every day is full of work.

items.line_en: But I am happy.

coach.say: But I am happy.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But I am happy.

items.line_en: I hope you found these words useful today.

coach.say: I hope you found these words useful today.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I hope you found these words useful today.

items.line_en: Try to use them in your daily life.

coach.say: Try to use them in your daily life.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Try to use them in your daily life.

items.line_en: We are creating more easy to understand stories

coach.say: We are creating more easy to understand stories
coach.hint: Chunk it: We are creating more easy to understand stories

items.line_en: to help you improve.

coach.say: to help you improve.
coach.hint: Chunk it: to help you improve.

items.line_en: If this lesson was helpful, please give it a like

coach.say: If this lesson was helpful, please give it a like
coach.hint: Chunk it: If this lesson was helpful, / please give it a like

items.line_en: and share it with your friends.

coach.say: and share it with your friends.
coach.hint: Chunk it: and share it with your friends.

items.line_en: Don't forget to subscribe for more.

coach.say: Don't forget to subscribe for more.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget to subscribe for more.

items.line_en: Thanks for watching.

coach.say: Thanks for watching.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks for watching.

items.line_en: See you soon.

coach.say: See you soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: See you soon.
